_about: Per-channel latency constants used by FrankaViveEnv / FrankaPolicyEnv. Auto-managed by scripts_real/calibrate_*.py via polymetis_franka_teleop.common.latency_config helpers. Values in seconds.

_notes.camera_zed: TODO: calibrate with scripts_real/calibrate_zed_latency.py (ZED uses proprietary SDK timestamps, not RealSense HW timestamps -- value reused from RealSense as a placeholder).
_notes.gripper_art: TODO: calibrate with scripts_real/calibrate_art_gripper_latency.py (ART uses direct TCP :50053, not the ZeroRPC path that calibrate_franka_gripper_latency.py measures -- value reused from Franka Hand as a placeholder).
